name: TestGetWaitPDUData
title: TestGetWaitPDUData
syntax: long TestGetWaitPDUData (dword explicitJoinIndex, PDU * aPDU); // form 2
description: If a valid PDU is the last event that triggers a wait instruction, the PDU’s content can be called up with form 1.
Form 2 can only be used for joined events. The number of the joined event (return value of TestJoin...) is here being used as an index.

parameters.name: aPDU
parameters.description: PDU variable of type PDU that should be filled in with this function. It has to be either a type free PDU variable, or a PDU variable that was created for the PDU type that triggered the wait instruction.

parameters.name: explicitJoinIndex
parameters.description: Number of the joined event corresponds with the return value of TestJoin....

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
